summary: `pgg-code`와 `pgg-refactor`의 task 완료 시점 commit, QA final completion commit, refactor health check 계약을 proposal로 확정했다.
stage task commit lifecycle, `archive_type` 반영 message contract, refactor proof, QA final completion commit 경계로 plan/task/spec를 확정했다.
stage helper, archive_type-aware commit validation, refactor proof gate, QA completion ordering, README/test regression을 구현하고 기록했다.
shared shell builder 추출과 ignored `poggn` force-add 보정으로 stage commit과 archive publish가 실제 repo ignore 규칙 아래에서도 동작하게 정리했다.

why: Shared shell helpers and force-add handling are needed so stage commit and archive publish still work when poggn is ignored locally.

summary: build/test, QA gate, manual verification contract, git remote 상태를 확인하고 archive 가능한 QA report를 기록했다.

why: QA artifacts and final verification updates need a completion commit before archive publish.

cleanupReason: Removed the ai branch after promoting 'release/0.6.2-task-governance'. No remote ai branch existed.
